channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Alphabet paces for worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits
item.description: Google parent Alphabet has seen consecutive high-profile artificial intelligence researchers leave.

item.title: SpaceX signs computing power deal with open-source AI startup Reflection worth up to $6.3 billion
item.description: SpaceX has turned its Colossus data center into a commercial computing power platform, landing recent deals with Anthropic, Google and Cursor.

item.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
item.description: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Alphabet, AeroVironment, Salesforce, Apogee Therapeutics & more
item.description: Here are some of the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Three key AI stocks to watch this week with traders expecting giant moves
item.description: Micron and Cerebras report this week. Also there's heavy options activity in Super Micro.

item.title: S&P 500 falls as Big Tech and SpaceX struggle: Live updates
item.description: The S&P 500 was relatively unchanged on Monday, while oil prices fell, as Wall Street assessed the latest developments in the Iran war negotiations.

item.title: Industrials are catching up to the rest of the market. Katie Stockton is watching these names
item.description: The founder of Fairlead Strategies says three industrial stocks are poised for strong moves higher, based on the charts.

item.title: SpaceX stock falls 9%, pacing for third-straight day of losses after red-hot IPO start
item.description: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past two full days of trading.

item.title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
item.description: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war, as they depart the Persian Gulf loaded with oil.

item.title: Senate poised to advance housing bill to limit private equity purchases of single-family homes
item.description: Both chambers of Congress are expected to advance a sprawling housing package this week that's aimed at creating more supply and making homes more affordable.

item.title: Companies are demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently
item.description: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro touted a $20 billion economic development deal last June, the state's largest ever. It's caused Shapiro no shortage of grief.

item.title: Clive Davis, music industry starmaker, has died at 94
item.description: Davis launched or resurrected the careers of superstars such as Janis Joplin, Whitney Houston, Carlos Santana and Alicia Keys.

item.title: Meta's WhatsApp head to step down, will be replaced by Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah
item.description: Will Cathcart will step down as the head of WhatsApp and move into another role at the company. Kunal Shah will take over.

item.title: Micron earnings and inflation data: What Jay Woods is watching this week
item.description: NYSE insider Jay Woods also dives into two other stocks reporting earnings this week: FedEx and Darden Restaurants.

item.title: Vance hails 'great progress' in U.S.-Iran talks despite 'threatening' and 'whining'
item.description: JD Vance said U.S.-Iran talks in Switzerland made progress, with Tehran agreeing to allow IAEA inspectors back into Iran.

item.title: Micron quadruples year-to-date. Wall Street mostly thinks Wednesday's earnings will live up to the hype
item.description: Several Wall Street firms are considerably above consensus estimates.

item.title: SpaceX kicks off bond sale days after record IPO, discloses over $100 billion cash pile
item.description: SpaceX on Monday unveiled a senior unsecured notes offering and said it held about $100.8 billion in cash.

item.title: Can anyone join Musk in the trillionaire club? Zuckerberg has best shot, according to prediction markets
item.description: The Meta CEO is seen as next to join the Tesla and SpaceX CEO. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is seen as the second-most-likely.

item.title: Bank of America expects three Fed hikes this year, says inflation is getting 'unambiguously worse'
item.description: The bank's economists reversed their position held as recently as last week that the central bank would stay on hold this year.

item.title: CNBC Elite Advisors: Top ultra-high net worth wealth management firms for 2026
item.description: CNBC Elite Advisors recognizes wealth management firms serving high net worth and UHNW clients.

item.title: Apple is a notable outlier in Monday's drubbing of mega-cap tech stocks
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: CNBC Points Pro: Which credit card is best for earning rewards on Uber rides?
item.description: Points expert Jason Stauffer shares which credit cards earn the most rewards on Uber rides.

item.title: Who is Andy Burnham? And 4 other things investors should know as the UK replaces its prime minister
item.description: Keir Starmer’s exit puts Andy Burnham, gilts, sterling and the next UK chancellor in focus for investors.

item.title: Child care tax breaks can save families and businesses money — but few use them, congressional report finds
item.description: Child care can be expensive for both parents and their employers. Yet existing tax incentives to help defray those costs may go unused, a new report finds.

item.title: 'Reward for failure': Investor support for Target Chair Brian Cornell falls to lowest level ever
item.description: Target Chair Brian Cornell built the retailer into a $100 billion-plus giant, but recent struggles and underperformance have fueled investor calls for change.

item.title: Lucid to lay off roughly 18% of U.S. workforce, COO Marc Winterhoff leaves
item.description: Lucid Group is cutting its U.S. workforce by 18% as part of a cost-savings plan. It also said COO Marc Winterhoff is departing effective immediately.

item.title: Shipping stalls in Strait of Hormuz after Iran declares key waterway closed again
item.description: The update comes even as industry trackers showed Iranian tankers have continued to sail through the strait.

item.title: How to pick up some quick income using an auto stock hitting its stride
item.description: With broader macro uncertainties driving pocketed volatility across the automotive sector, patient options traders have an exceptional set-up to harvest high-quality premiums.

item.title: UK PM Starmer resigns as Britain faces its seventh leader in 10 years
item.description: Keir Starmer said he will resign as U.K. prime minister and Labour leader, triggering a contest to choose his successor.

item.title: UPS to invest $48 million in temperature-controlled facilities amid healthcare boom
item.description: UPS is announcing a new investment in healthcare logistics as demand for the temperature-controlled category booms, CNBC has learned exclusively.
